subcodes.first_line: O Ali! Thou hast attained unto My remembrance aforetime. Verily, He remembereth whoso turneth unto Him, heareth him who voiceth His praise, and seeth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا علی قد فزت بذکری من قبل انه یذکر من اقبل الیه و یسمع من ینطق بثنائه و یری
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @proclamation to the people of the world, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
